name: Chocolate Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9 by 13 inch baking pan.
3. Beat butter until fluffy.
4. Add sugar gradually, beating until light and fluffy.
5. Add eggs, buttermilk, and vanilla; beat until well mixed.
6. Whisk together flour, cocoa, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, and cloves in a separate bowl.
7. Gradually add the dry mixture to the egg mixture; beat until smooth.
8. Stir in zucchini until well incorporated.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan and sprinkle chocolate chips on top.
10. Bake for 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Cool on a wire rack.
12. Serve cut into squares (this is a very moist cake because of the zucchini; it seems to hold the moisture).
